text: Henry Reed, one of the sculptors, invited Jonah Kramer to try Jonah Kramer's hand at carving. With trepidation, Jonah Kramer accepted the offered chisel and approached a small block of ice. Under Henry Reed's guidance, Jonah Kramer began to shape the frozen mass, Jonah Kramer's movements clumsy at first but growing more confident with each strike.
context: Jonah Kramer, after admiring the ice sculptures and spending time with Karsyn Schaeffer, is invited by one of the sculptors to try carving ice himself.
